oldMatchDict.docstring:
Calculate slice bound that corresponds to given label.

Returns leftmost (one-past-the-rightmost if ``side=='right'``) position
of given label.

Parameters
----------
label : object
side : {'left', 'right'}
kind : {'loc', 'getitem'} or None

    .. deprecated:: 1.4.0

Returns
-------
int
    Index of label.
